Workplace Adjustments Guide

2022

🚧 Status: Work-in-progress

Overview

As part of my role as Disabilities Officer at United Tech and Allied Workers (UTAW), I am building a searchable, interactive guide to workplace adjustments, to help inform and empower employees requesting adjustments, and provide a knowledgebase for workers to know what adjustments may work for them.
